A

AiController - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
GraphQL Controller that exposes the Orasaka AI capabilities as queries, mutations, and subscriptions.
AiController(OrasakaAiClient, IdentityService, ChatStreamService, IdentityInfrastructureProperties, ResourceLoader, OrasakaGraphEngine) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.AiController
Constructs the controller.
allowedOrigins() - Method in record class com.orasaka.gateway.config.GatewayProperties.CorsProperties
Returns the value of the allowedOrigins record component.

Analyze audio REST endpoint.
AnalyzeAudioRequest(String, String) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.gateway.support.MediaContracts.AnalyzeAudioRequest
Creates an instance of a AnalyzeAudioRequest record class.
analyzePoster(MediaContracts.AnalyzePosterRequest) - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.ChatStreamController
Analyze image REST endpoint.
AnalyzePosterRequest(String, String) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.gateway.support.MediaContracts.AnalyzePosterRequest
Creates an instance of a AnalyzePosterRequest record class.
audioBase64() - Method in record class com.orasaka.gateway.support.MediaContracts.AnalyzeAudioRequest
Returns the value of the audioBase64 record component.
AuthContracts - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
Group of immutable authentication data contracts.
AuthContracts.LoginRequest - Record Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
Request data containing credentials.
AuthContracts.OAuthRequest - Record Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
Request data containing OAuth profile details.
AuthContracts.RegisterRequest - Record Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
Request data containing registration details.
AuthContracts.RegisterResult - Record Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
Result of registration indicating either success or failure.
AuthContracts.VerifyTokenRequest - Record Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
Request payload for verifying account tokens.
authorities(User) - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.AiController
Schemamapping for authorities list.

C

CachedBodyHttpServletRequest - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.config
Caches incoming HTTP request body bytes so they can be read multiple times.
CachedBodyHttpServletRequest(HttpServletRequest) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.gateway.config.CachedBodyHttpServletRequest
Constructs the request wrapper and caches the body.
chat(String, String) - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.AiController
Mutation executing chat.
chatStream(String, String) - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.AiController
Subscription streaming chat response.
ChatStreamController - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
REST controller exposing real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) chat streaming and media analysis.
ChatStreamController(ChatStreamService, OrasakaAiClient) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.ChatStreamController
Constructs the controller.
ChatStreamService - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.service
Service orchestrating AI chat streaming flows for SSE and GraphQL subscriptions.
ChatStreamService(OrasakaAiClient) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.gateway.service.ChatStreamService
Initializes the service with the AI client and a virtual thread executor.

R

RateLimitConfig - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.config
Conditional configuration class for the dynamic rate limiting engine.
RateLimitConfig(RateLimitProperties) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.gateway.config.RateLimitConfig
Constructs the rate limiting configuration class with injected environment properties.
rateLimitFilter(ProxyManager<String>, OrasakaRateLimitTierRepository) - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.config.RateLimitConfig
Instantiates the custom RateLimitFilter bean using the Lettuce proxy manager and a JDBC template to retrieve database tiers.
RateLimitFilter - Class in com.orasaka.gateway.config
 
RateLimitFilter(ProxyManager<String>, OrasakaRateLimitTierRepository, RateLimitProperties) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.gateway.config.RateLimitFilter

Configures a FilterRegistrationBean to disable automatic container registration of the filter.
RateLimitProperties - Record Class in com.orasaka.gateway.config
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka rate limiting settings.

Creates an instance of a RateLimitProperties record class.
redisClient() - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.config.RateLimitConfig
Instantiates the standalone Lettuce RedisClient bean.
redisConnection(RedisClient) - Method in class com.orasaka.gateway.config.RateLimitConfig
Opens a stateful connection to the Redis server using a UTF-8 String codec for keys and a raw byte array codec for values.

Returns the value of the redisUrl record component.
